title: Welcome to Culty Towers
text:
Mara inherited this farm from grandparents she'd never really known and moved here with a skillset that never really fit. She'd grown up Catholic with a deep interest in everything which was banned and that curiosity only increased as she dove deeper into the esoteric traditions of the world. Some people dream of starting a family - Mara started a cult.

Cults, however, are more like families than people realize (although the reverse is just as true) and after a few years, problems started to emerge - namely how to pay the property tax on this enormous piece of land in the middle of nowhere when all we do is talk about old books and drink tea?

title: I guess you're wondering how I ended up here
text:
That's where you come in. In a previous life, you were in marketing but never got comfortable in the corporate world. Surely there was more to life than the endgame your colleagues had their sights set on. Over a long weekend hiking you met a few weirdos at a country pub who told you about their living situation on an old farm and invited you to come by whenever you wanted. Not long after you decided to take them up on it.

You met Mara and the rest of the bunch, weirdos the lot of them, but certainly no worse than the people you spent your days with and in some cases significantly better. You learned of the money troubles Mara was facing and hatched a plan - in return for room and board, you would help set up and manage a weekend retreat here via an online booking platform.

Aldous joked they'd be just like Fawlty Towers - Dmitros suggested 'Culty Towers' and the name stuck. So did you and now you're here, about to welcome your first guests.

title: So how do we do this?
text: Host guests. Get good reviews. Get more guests. Save the farm. Easy, right?
